title: Deciphering the mechanism of action of antitubercular compounds with metabolomics.
author: Sakallioglu IT Barletta RG Dussault PH Powers R
content: S-EPMC8358470 PMC8358470 Deciphering the mechanism of action of antitubercular compounds with metabolomics. Tuberculosis (TB), one of the oldest and deadliest bacterial diseases, continues to cause serious global economic, health, and social problems. Current TB treatments are lengthy, expensive
